parameters.query: SELECT w.domain, e.url_path, COUNT(*) as views FROM website_event e JOIN website w ON w.website_id = e.website_id WHERE e.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND (e.url_path LIKE '/posts/%' OR e.url_path LIKE '/blog/%') AND e.url_path NOT IN ('/', '/blog/', '/posts/') AND e.url_path NOT SIMILAR TO '%/[0-9]+' GROUP BY w.domain, e.url_path ORDER BY views DESC LIMIT 6

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.4, max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) expert. Your job is to improve articles so AI tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude are more likely to cite them. Focus on: clear direct answers, FAQ sections, structured data signals, E-A-T markers.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Article slug: ' + $json.slug + '
Already has FAQ: ' + $json.hasFAQ + '

Article content (first 3000 chars):
' + $json.content.slice(0, 3000) + '

' + ($json.hasFAQ ? 'The article has a FAQ section. Generate an IMPROVED version with better direct answers and 2 additional FAQ items.' : 'Generate a FAQ section (5 Q&A pairs) to append to this article. Questions should match what users ask AI tools. Format as markdown:

## FAQ

**Q: ...**
A: [Direct, concise answer in 1-2 sentences]

') + '

Also return a JSON object with: { gaps: [string], faq_markdown: string, improvement_note: string }' }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'aeo: add FAQ section to ' + $json.slug, content: Buffer.from($json.updatedContent).toString('base64'), sha: $json.sha }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: '-1003767033253', text: 'AEO-optimering klar Artikel: ' + $('Build Updated Article').first().json.slug + ' Sajt: ' + $('Build Updated Article').first().json.domain + ' Visningar (7d): ' + $('Build Updated Article').first().json.views + ' ' + ($('Build Updated Article').first().json.improvNote || 'FAQ-sektion tillagd'), parse_mode: 'HTML', disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}
